data.title: Norske Skog Launches Major Recycled Packaging Production at Golbey
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

Norske Skog ASA ( (DE:0BQ) ) has issued an update.

Norske Skog has commenced recycled packaging production at its Golbey factory, marking the largest single investment in its history with a total of 400 million euros. This development significantly boosts its packaging paper capacity and positions the company as a major player in the European paper and packaging industry. The Golbey factory will not only enhance Norske Skog’s operational capabilities but also contribute to regional sustainable development by recycling over one million tons of paper and generating green energy. The factory is expected to reach full capacity by 2027, generating substantial revenue and creating long-term jobs. This aligns with the growing demand for environmentally friendly packaging, driven by e-commerce growth.

More about Norske Skog ASA

Norske Skog is a leading producer of publication and packaging paper with four high-quality industrial plants, strong market positions, and close customer relationships in Europe. The company aims to diversify its business and continue its transformation towards growth and high-margin markets through various development projects. Headquartered in Norway, Norske Skog is listed on the Oslo Stock Exchange and employs around 1,700 people.

Average Trading Volume: 247,611

Current Market Cap: NOK1.92B

Learn more about 0BQ stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

Meridian Bank ( (MRBK) ) has provided an announcement.

Meridian Bank held its Annual Meeting of Shareholders on May 22, 2025, during which shareholders elected three directors to the Board for a three-year term and approved a non-binding proposal on executive compensation. Additionally, the shareholders ratified the appointment of Crowe LLP as the independent registered public accounting firm for the year ending December 31, 2025.

The stock’s low valuation and attractive dividend yield partially offset these concerns, making it a potentially appealing option for value investors despite current operational headwinds.

data.title: WISeKey’s SEALSQ in Talks to Acquire IC’ALPS
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks straight to you inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

WISeKey International Holding ( (WKEY) ) has provided an announcement.

On May 22, 2025, WISeKey International Holding Ltd announced that its subsidiary, SEALSQ Corp, is in exclusive negotiations to acquire 100% of IC’ALPS SAS, a specialist in ASIC design and supply based in France. This strategic acquisition, pending a Share Purchase Agreement and regulatory approvals, aims to enhance SEALSQ’s ASIC development capabilities to meet growing market demands. The acquisition involves a fixed purchase price and potential earn-out payments, with implications for SEALSQ’s expansion and IC’ALPS’ integration into SEALSQ’s operations.

The most recent analyst rating on (WKEY) stock is a Buy with a $4.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on WISeKey International Holding stock, see the WKEY Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on WKEY Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, WKEY is a Neutral.

WISeKey’s overall stock score reflects significant financial challenges, including declining revenues and negative profit margins. Although the company holds strategic initiatives and a strong cash position, the immediate financial struggles and valuation issues weigh heavily on its stock performance. Technical analysis shows some positive momentum, but potential short-term risks exist due to overbought indicators. The mixed sentiment from the earnings call adds complexity to the outlook.

To see Spark’s full report on WKEY stock, click here.

More about WISeKey International Holding

WISeKey International Holding Ltd is a global leader in cybersecurity, digital identity, and IoT solutions, operating as a Swiss-based holding company. It manages several subsidiaries, including SEALSQ Corp, which focuses on semiconductors, PKI, and post-quantum technology products. WISeKey secures digital identity ecosystems for individuals and objects using Blockchain, AI, and IoT technologies, with over 1.6 billion microchips deployed across various IoT sectors.

Average Trading Volume: 146,735

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $72.84M

data.title: Altiplano Metals Reports Positive Operational Update from Chilean Projects
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks straight to you inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

Altiplano Minerals ( (TSE:APN) ) has shared an update.

Altiplano Metals Inc. has provided an operational update on its Santa Beatriz copper/gold mine and El Peñón processing facility in Chile. Between January and March 2025, the company processed 5,391 tonnes of mineralized material, generating 142.5 tonnes of copper-gold concentrate and US$315,515 in revenue. Additionally, 2,432 tonnes of iron were sold, generating US$124,016. The company is reviewing mine development at Santa Beatriz, with plans to increase production capacity. Altiplano continues to supplement its supply with third-party material as it develops production opportunities.

Spark’s Take on TSE:APN Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:APN is a Neutral.

Altiplano Minerals exhibits significant potential with recent revenue growth and strategic moves to enhance revenue streams. However, persistent profitability challenges and negative cash flows hinder its overall financial health. Technical indicators suggest short-term positive momentum, but caution is advised due to valuation concerns and the lack of profitability. The recent corporate event provides an optimistic outlook for revenue diversification.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:APN stock, click here.

More about Altiplano Minerals

Altiplano Metals is a growing gold, silver, and copper company focused on the Americas. The company has a diversified portfolio of assets that include exploration properties, a developing copper/gold/iron mine, and a state-of-the-art operating copper/gold and iron processing facility. Altiplano is focused on creating long-term stakeholder value through developing safe and sustainable production, reinvesting into exploration and development, and pursuing acquisition opportunities to provide scalable upside opportunities.

Landmark Bancorp ( (LARK) ) has shared an announcement.

On May 21, 2025, Landmark Bancorp, Inc. held its Annual Meeting of Stockholders in Manhattan, Kansas, where 80.8% of the outstanding shares were represented. During the meeting, four Class III board members were elected, executive compensation was approved on a non-binding basis, and the frequency of future say-on-pay proposals was set to occur annually. Additionally, Crowe LLP was ratified as the company’s independent registered public accounting firm for 2025.

Landmark Bancorp, Inc. operates in the financial services industry, providing banking and financial solutions. The company focuses on offering a range of services including commercial and consumer banking, mortgage lending, and investment services, primarily targeting customers in Kansas.

The latest update is out from Octopus Apollo VCT ( (GB:OAP3) ).

Octopus Apollo VCT plc has announced its final results for the year ending 31 January 2025, showcasing a robust performance with a total return of 5.1% and net assets reaching £483 million. The company successfully raised £75 million in its latest fundraising effort and maintained a stable NAV per share, reflecting resilience amid challenging macroeconomic conditions. The board declared a total dividend of 2.6p per share, aligning with its 5% annual dividend yield policy. Additionally, the company has been classified as a full scope Alternative Investment Fund, marking a significant milestone in its growth trajectory.

More about Octopus Apollo VCT

Octopus Apollo VCT plc is a Venture Capital Trust focused on providing shareholders with tax-free dividends and long-term capital growth through investments in a diverse portfolio of primarily unquoted companies. The company is managed by Octopus Investments Limited, specifically through its investment team, Octopus Ventures.

data.title: AGI Announces $75 Million Debenture Offering and Reaffirms 2025 Outlook
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks straight to you inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

The latest update is out from Ag Growth International ( (TSE:AFN) ).

Ag Growth International Inc. (AGI) has announced a $75 million offering of senior subordinated unsecured debentures, with the potential to increase to $86.25 million if the over-allotment option is fully exercised. The proceeds will be used to repay existing debt, enhancing AGI’s financial flexibility and supporting its international commercial growth strategy. This move is part of AGI’s commitment to responsible debt management and maintaining its strong market position. Additionally, AGI has reaffirmed its 2025 financial outlook, including an Adjusted EBITDA guidance of at least $225 million for the full year.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:AFN) stock is a Buy with a C$47.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Ag Growth International stock, see the TSE:AFN Stock Forecast page.

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:AFN is a Neutral.

Ag Growth International’s overall score reflects a mix of moderate financial challenges and positive technical trends. Strong corporate governance and strategic initiatives provide a positive outlook, but the company’s financial performance and valuation need improvement. The earnings call highlights growth potential in the Commercial segment, offsetting some of the financial risks.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:AFN stock, click here.

More about Ag Growth International

AGI is a provider of equipment and solutions for the efficient storage, transport, and processing of food globally. The company operates manufacturing facilities in Canada, the United States, Brazil, India, France, and Italy, distributing its products worldwide.

data.title: Philly Shipyard ASA Adjusts Liquidation Timeline and Plans Delisting
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks straight to you inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

The latest announcement is out from Philly Shipyard ASA ( (AKRRF) ).

Philly Shipyard ASA has announced adjustments to its liquidation process, maintaining its plan to distribute approximately USD 10.4 million to shareholders by Q2 2025. The company will defer its final liquidation until the expiration of an escrow period, during which USD 10 million will be held as security for contingent liabilities. The company plans to delist from the Oslo Stock Exchange, convert into a private limited company, and continue minimal operations to manage reporting obligations and facilitate cash distributions.

More about Philly Shipyard ASA

Philly Shipyard ASA is a company involved in the shipbuilding industry. It primarily focuses on constructing vessels and has been undergoing a liquidation process following the sale of its operational arm, Philly Shipyard, Inc., to Hanwha.

data.title: Compagnia dei Caraibi Unveils New Wine IS Catalog Celebrating Global Wine Diversity
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks straight to you inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

Compagnia dei Caraibi S.p.A. ( (IT:TIME) ) has provided an announcement.

Compagnia dei Caraibi has launched the new edition of its Wine IS catalog, part of the Elemento Indigeno project, which showcases a diverse selection of wines from around the world. This edition emphasizes the wild essence and instinctive nature of wine, featuring a creative direction by Gianluca Cannizzo and categorizing wines into eight thematic groups, each represented by a totemic animal. With over 392 references from 26 countries, the catalog offers a rich and international perspective on contemporary wine production, aiming to engage consumers with both visual and narrative elements.

More about Compagnia dei Caraibi S.p.A.

Compagnia dei Caraibi S.p.A. is a Piedmontese company specializing in the importation, development, brand building, and distribution of premium and over-premium spirits, wines, and soft drinks globally, along with Italian craft beers.
